center.name: 科科群岛
center.summary: 科科群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Andaman coucal、Andaman drongo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly found in the Andamans (at least South, North and associated islets) as well as on the nearby Coco Islands and Table Island, which belong to Myanmar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There are two subspecies, the nominate race being found across the main islands of the archipelago, and the race dicruriformis occurring on Great Coco Island and Table Island in the north of the chain
